entryPoint.trigger: onClick on 🏷️ button (card line 881, list row line 926)

calls.notes: Prevents the parent card/row onClick (handleDocumentClick) from also firing.
Sets tagEditorVisible=true, tagEditorDocId=doc.id, tagEditorTags=[...doc.tags] (shallow copy), tagEditorInput=''. No API call.

entryPoint.trigger: onClick on Add button (line 831) or Enter keypress in tag input (handleTagKeyPress, line 659)

calls.notes: Appends trimmed input to tagEditorTags and clears tagEditorInput. Guard: tag must be non-empty, not already present, and tagEditorTags.length < 10.

entryPoint.trigger: onClick on × span next to each tag (line 840)

calls.notes: Filters tagEditorTags to remove the clicked tag by value.
Sets tagSaving=true before API call; disables Save button.
Bearer token from localStorage('docvault_token') is attached by request interceptor.
Maps over documents array, replaces matching doc's tags with tagEditorTags. Sets tagSaving=false and tagEditorVisible=false.
Sets tagSaving=false only; modal stays open. Error is logged to console.error, not displayed to the user.

entryPoint.trigger: onClick on Cancel button (line 849) or onClick on overlay backdrop (line 818)

calls.notes: Sets tagEditorVisible=false, tagEditorDocId=null, tagEditorTags=[], tagEditorInput=''. Discards unsaved changes.
